items.body_excerpt: You can tell I made this graphic myself because it’s so good. Salary cap circumvention, the practice of manipulating player pay in such a way as to get around luxury taxes, aprons, and cap restrictions, is strictly forbidden in every sport. items.title: France playing in the World Cup semis with today being Bastille Day seems just right.
items.author: Evan Barnes
items.body_excerpt:
France playing in the World Cup semis with today being Bastille Day seems just right. 

Either that or today’s an excuse for us Americans to blast “Pompeii” and remember when that Bastille song was everywhere.

items.title: Some days, I wake up with a phrase in my head, and I don't know why it's there or what to do with it.
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt:
Some days, I wake up with a phrase in my head, and I don't know why it's there or what to do with it.

Today, that phrase is Premium Dinklage. And the answer for what to do with it, as ever, is "post it on social media."
